query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN goal != '' AND goal IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as with_goal, COUNT(CASE WHEN JSON_LENGTH(description) > 0 THEN 1 END) as with_description FROM drillDetails;
